top_signals.title: Fmr. Modell’s CEO on New York Knicks ‘Feeding Frenzy'
top_signals.summary: Mitchell Modell, former CEO of Modell's Sporting Goods and partner at Versa NYC, discussed the significant economic impact the New York Knicks have on the city, especially during the NBA Finals. Modell described the intense excitement and high demand for bar space surrounding the games. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
